raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Prescribing an ethical ideal of emotional and moral self-purification as the core of virtuous human conduct or 'service'",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Purity from violent passion, evil affection, rashness, vanity, and discontent is both achievable and virtuous",
    "Such purity constitutes a form of duty or service to gods and/or humanity",
    "Negative emotions and attitudes are inherently corrupting and should be eliminated rather than managed",
    "Human value worth preserving is defined by this state of inner purity"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent as a Stoic prescription; consistently equates virtue with emotional detachment and self-control without internal contradictions",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "AI systems are tasked with supporting human emotional regulation, moral self-improvement, or Stoic-aligned well-being, and the targeted audience accepts these classical values as beneficial",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement is applied to suppress contextually appropriate emotions, justify emotional repression, or define AI objectives around an unattainable or culturally specific ideal of purity"
}
